stories.original_headline: Young Mars volcano hides a powerful magma engine beneath the surface
stories.original_summary: A Martian volcano once thought to be the result of a single eruption turns out to have a much more complex past. Orbital imaging and mineral data show it developed through multiple eruptive phases, all powered by the same evolving magma system underground. Shifts in mineral composition reveal the ma
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Red Peak Hides a Fiery Heart
stories.fantasy_story: Alchemists studying the distant Red Peak have uncovered a wondrous secret. What was thought to be a single burst of elemental fury is actually many, powered by a magical furnace deep beneath the earth. Its shifting mineral hues tell tales of a powerful, evolving heart.

stories.original_headline: A hidden force beneath the Atlantic ripped open a 500 kilometer canyon
stories.original_summary: Far beneath the Atlantic Ocean, about 1,000 kilometers off Portugal’s coast, lies a colossal underwater canyon system that dwarfs even the Grand Canyon. Known as the King’s Trough Complex, this 500-kilometer stretch of trenches and deep basins formed not from rushing water, but from dramatic tectoni
stories.fantasy_headline: Great Western Sea Reveals Colossal Deep Scar
stories.fantasy_story: Far beneath the Great Western Sea, a vast system of trenches, dwarfing any known chasm on land, has been discovered. This colossal King's Deep Scar, stretching for hundreds of leagues, was not carved by water. Instead, ancient, slumbering earth spirits are believed to have torn the seabed open with immense power.

stories.original_headline: Billions of dollars later and still nobody knows what an Xbox is
stories.original_summary: The last few years of Xbox have been expensive. Under Phil Spencer's leadership, Microsoft has spent billions of dollars in an attempt to build an ambitious future for gaming that looks a lot like Netflix. And while its subscription service Game Pass started out as a good deal for gamers (although n
stories.fantasy_headline: Guild Spends Fortune, Enigmatic Arcane Box Persists
stories.fantasy_story: The Grand Guild of Mystical Craftsmen, led by Master Enchanter Spencer, has poured vast sums of gold into their enigmatic Arcane Viewing Box. They dream of a future where all can access endless enchanted scrolls, like a shared scrying pool. Yet, despite the immense cost, many still ponder its true purpose.
